description_long: This is a medium-sized, cubic wooden storage box with a stylized, cartoon-like appearance. The box features visible wood grain patterns and subtle carved swirls on its panels, giving it a rustic and hand-crafted look. Each face is bordered by a slightly raised wooden frame, and the corners are reinforced with small, round metallic fasteners. The top surface is flat and appears to be a solid, non-removable lid, blending seamlessly with the rest of the box. The wood is a warm, medium brown color, and the surface finish is matte with a slightly rough texture. There are no visible handles, locks, or labeling areas, making the design simple and utilitarian.
description: A cubic, stylized wooden storage box with visible wood grain, metallic corner fasteners, and a matte, rustic finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows a flat wooden panel with carved swirls and a metallic fastener at the top right corner.
description_view_1: This side displays diagonal wood grain lines and two metallic fasteners at the top left and bottom right corners.
description_view_2: The panel here has subtle, straight wood grain and a single metallic fastener at the top left corner.
description_view_3: This view features a mostly plain wooden panel with faint horizontal grain and a metallic fastener at the top left.
